title: Google Drive list_files
description: Search or list files and folders, including Google Sheets/spreadsheets by name or title.

query.description: Drive search query. To find a Google Sheet by exact title, use a query like name = '<spreadsheet title>' and mimeType = 'application/vnd.google-apps.spreadsheet' and trashed = false.

page_size.description: Maximum number of results. Defaults to 25.

order_by.description: Sort order, such as modifiedTime desc or name.

drive_id.description: Shared drive ID when corpora is drive.
